name: Family Dollar Stores, Inc.
description: Family Dollar Stores, Inc. operates a chain of variety stores in the United States. The company offers a range of merchandise for the whole family, including household products, health and beauty aids, packaged food and beverage products, apparel and accessories, and seasonal goods. Family Dollar serves low- to middle-income consumers by providing quality merchandise at everyday low prices in convenient neighborhood locations. In 2015, the company was acquired by Dollar Tree, Inc., but continues to operate under the Family Dollar brand.
